channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Australia news live: NSW to introduce minimum age for ebike riders; Angus Taylor calls for end to ‘net zero ideology’
item.description: Opposition leader signals his Liberals will abandon net zero commitment entirely. Follow updates live Get our breaking news email , free app or daily ...

item.title: Avalanche risks remain high in California after deaths of skiers
item.description: Forecasters predict more snow in Sierra Nevada mountains as climate crisis increases threat of dangerous conditions Avalanche risks remain high in the...

item.title: Trump warns Iran ‘bad things’ will happen if they fail to make a ‘meaningful’ nuclear deal – US politics live
item.description: US president appears to set 10-day deadline for Iran in address to first Board of Peace meeting Authoritarians, strongmen and dictators: who is on Tru...

item.title: CDC vaccine panel meeting postponed amid RFK Jr bid to reshape policy
item.description: Postponement of ACIP meeting this month comes as US pediatricians challenge committee’s legitimacy in court A meeting of the US vaccine advisory panel...

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor released under investigation after arrest – live
item.description: Andrew pictured on Thursday evening as police say searches in Norfolk have ended Full report: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor arrested Why has former princ...

item.title: Epstein files could be just tip of the iceberg for Andrew investigation
item.description: It is likely we have only seen the tip of the iceberg compared to what the police have seen.

item.title: Single nasal spray vaccine could protect against all colds and flus, researchers say
item.description: A Stanford University team have tested their nasal spray vaccine in animals but still need to do human clinical trials.

item.title: Lobbying firm co-founded by Mandelson on brink of collapse
item.description: Global Counsel says administrators will take control on Friday, blaming the "maelstrom" surrounding Mandelson.

item.title: He told police his XL bullies were friendly – days later his mother-in-law was mauled to death
item.description: Ashley Warren is the first person in England and Wales to be prosecuted under XL bully laws.

item.title: Trump's Board of Peace members pledge $7bn in Gaza relief
item.description: Trump said it "looks like" Hamas will disarm, even though there are signs the group is regrouping.
